name: Turkiye Sigorta Anonim Sirketi
summary: T√É¬ºrkiye Sigorta Anonim Sirketi operates as a non-life insurance company in Turkey. It also provides home, motor, workplace, personal accident, and yacht insurances, as well as reinsurance products. The company was formerly known as G√É¬ºnes Sigorta Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to T√É¬ºrkiye Sigorta Anonim Sirketi in August 2020.
